    <h1 {...{
      "id": "fetch-and-display-inbox"
    }}>{`Fetch and Display Inbox`}</h1>
    <p>{`This tutorial explains how to fetch and display an Inbox in your application.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "pre-requisites"
    }}>{`Pre-requisites`}</h2>
    <p><a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../index.md#implement-extension-in-mobile-app"

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "fetch-inbox-content"
    }}>{`Fetch Inbox Content`}</h2>
    <p>{`To fetch the inbox content for the surfaces configured in `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://business.adobe.com/products/journey-optimizer/adobe-journey-optimizer.html"
      }}>{`Adobe Journey Optimizer`}</a>{` campaigns, call the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../code-based/api-reference.md#updatepropositionsforsurfaces"
      }}>{`updatePropositionsForSurfaces`}</a>{` API. You should batch requests for multiple surfaces in a single API call when possible.`}</p>

      "id": "swift"

    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{

      }}>{`let inboxSurface = Surface(path: "inbox")
Messaging.updatePropositionsForSurfaces([inboxSurface])
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "display-inbox"
    }}>{`Display Inbox`}</h2>
    <p>{`To display an Inbox, call `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`getInboxUI`}</inlineCode>{` with your configured surface. This API returns an `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../public-classes/inboxui.md"
      }}>{`InboxUI`}</a>{` instance immediately, which manages its own state transitions — loading, loaded, and error — automatically.`}</p>
    <InlineAlert variant="info" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`Call `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`updatePropositionsForSurfaces`}</inlineCode>{` before or after calling `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`getInboxUI`}</inlineCode>{`. The Inbox will begin displaying content once the fetch completes.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "swiftui-application"
    }}>{`SwiftUI Application`}</h3>
    <p>{`Use the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`InboxUI.view`}</inlineCode>{` property to embed the Inbox directly into your SwiftUI view hierarchy.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "swift-1"
    }}>{`Swift`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`import SwiftUI
import AEPMessaging

struct InboxPage: View {

    let inboxUI: InboxUI

    init() {
        let inboxSurface = Surface(path: "inbox")
        inboxUI = Messaging.getInboxUI(for: inboxSurface)
    }

    var body: some View {
        NavigationView {
            inboxUI.view
                .navigationTitle("Inbox")
        }
        .onAppear {
            let inboxSurface = Surface(path: "inbox")
            Messaging.updatePropositionsForSurfaces([inboxSurface])
        }
    }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "uikit-application"
    }}>{`UIKit Application`}</h3>
    <p>{`To display an Inbox in UIKit, wrap the SwiftUI `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`InboxUI.view`}</inlineCode>{` using `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`UIHostingController`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "swift-2"
    }}>{`Swift`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`import UIKit
import SwiftUI
import AEPMessaging

class InboxViewController: UIViewController {

    var inboxUI: InboxUI!

    override func viewDidLoad() {
        super.viewDidLoad()

        title = "Inbox"

        let inboxSurface = Surface(path: "inbox")
        inboxUI = Messaging.getInboxUI(for: inboxSurface)

        let hostingController = UIHostingController(rootView: inboxUI.view)

        addChild(hostingController)
        view.addSubview(hostingController.view)
        hostingController.didMove(toParent: self)

        hostingController.view.translatesAutoresizingMaskIntoConstraints = false
        NSLayoutConstraint.activate([
            hostingController.view.leadingAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.leadingAnchor),
            hostingController.view.trailingAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.trailingAnchor),
            hostingController.view.topAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.topAnchor),
            hostingController.view.bottomAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.bottomAnchor)
        ])

        Messaging.updatePropositionsForSurfaces([inboxSurface])
    }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "refreshing-inbox-data"

    <p>{`The Inbox provides two ways to refresh content.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "pull-to-refresh"

    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{

    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{

      }}>{`let inboxSurface = Surface(path: "inbox")
let inboxUI = Messaging.getInboxUI(for: inboxSurface)

inboxUI.isPullToRefreshEnabled = true
`}</code></pre>
    <InlineAlert variant="info" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`Pull-to-refresh is disabled by default. Set `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`isPullToRefreshEnabled = true`}</inlineCode>{` to enable it.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "programmatic-refresh"
    }}>{`Programmatic Refresh`}</h3>
    <p>{`Call `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`refresh()`}</inlineCode>{` to programmatically trigger a content refresh.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />

`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "best-practices"
    }}>{`Best Practices`}</h2>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol">
        <p parentName="li"><strong parentName="p">{`Fetch Early`}</strong>{`: Call `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`updatePropositionsForSurfaces`}</inlineCode>{` when your app launches or when the user navigates to the Inbox screen to ensure fresh content is available.`}</p>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ol">
        <p parentName="li"><strong parentName="p">{`Surface Naming`}</strong>{`: Use descriptive surface paths that match your Adobe Journey Optimizer campaign configuration (e.g., `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Surface(path: "inbox")`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Surface(path: "home_feed")`}</inlineCode>{`).`}</p>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ol">
        <p parentName="li"><strong parentName="p">{`Reuse InboxUI`}</strong>{`: Keep the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`InboxUI`}</inlineCode>{` instance alive as long as the Inbox view is visible. The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`InboxUI`}</inlineCode>{` maintains state and efficiently updates when content changes.`}</p>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ol">
        <p parentName="li"><strong parentName="p">{`Handle Multiple Surfaces`}</strong>{`: If your app has multiple Inboxes, create separate `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`InboxUI`}</inlineCode>{` instances with different surfaces.`}</p>
      </li>
    </ol>
